mapper.sql: sdmd.id, sdmd.distribution_method_id, sdmd.department, sdmd.administrative_office, sdmd.create_time, sdmd.create_by, sdmd.update_time, sdmd.update_by

${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.distribution_method_id as ${tAlias}_distribution_method_id, ${tAlias}.department as ${tAlias}_department, ${tAlias}.administrative_office as ${tAlias}_administrative_office, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by

select
,
from swm_distribution_method_department sdmd join swm_distribution_method sdm on sdm.id = sdmd.distribution_method_id and sdm.enabled_flag = 1
mapper.insert: insert into swm_distribution_method_department (distribution_method_id, department, administrative_office, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{distributionMethodId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{department,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{administrativeOffice,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update swm_distribution_method_department set distribution_method_id = #{distributionMethodId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, department = #{department,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, administrative_office = #{administrativeOffice,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select count(1) from swm_distribution_method_department sdmd join swm_distribution_method sdm on sdm.id = sdmd.distribution_method_id and sdm.enabled_flag = 1 AND sdm.id = #{id, jdbcType = BIGINT}
